alp_sorry_manifest.description: Placeholder proof for `Nat.prime_mul_left_inj` and related lemmas in `interaction_product_injective`.
alp_sorry_manifest.resolution: Replace `sorry` with a proof using the Fundamental Theorem of Arithmetic and prime injectivity.

alp_sorry_manifest.description: Manifested `sorry` for `canonical_non_parallelism` (Theorem 3.3, Canonical Non-Parallelism): the canonical MKT axes n̂_p, n̂_q are never parallel for distinct primes p ≠ q.
alp_sorry_manifest.resolution: Paired Rust/Kani witness: `crates/multiplicity/rust/multiplicity-math/src/nonparallelism.rs::verify_non_parallelism_distinct_primes` proves non-parallelism over the bounded prime domain [2,97]. Replace with a constructive transcendental proof for the general prime family.

alp_sorry_manifest.description: Manifested `sorry` for `abelian_collapse` (Abelian Collapse Theorem): single-axis (σ_x) baseline generators O^{orig}_p commute.
alp_sorry_manifest.resolution: Paired Rust/Kani witness: `crates/multiplicity/rust/multiplicity-math/src/nonparallelism.rs::verify_abelian_collapse_self_commutes`. Replace with the 2x2 matrix identity that exp(i·θ·σ_x) commutes with itself.
